dj_piggy.description: DJ Piggy — Social, creative hybrid. Collector seeds at Tarumba's Farm.

common.legal: Adults only. Comply with local regulations on collector seeds. We do not encourage illegal cultivation.

dj_piggy.subtitle: Booth on fire
dj_piggy.lead: The mental and social monster. Less body, more head. Cheerful chaos, high energy, constant motion.
dj_piggy.p1: The party starts in your head.
dj_piggy.p2: Ideas, laughter, chaos… everything spikes at once.
dj_piggy.p3: DJ Piggy won't chill you out—it spins you up.
dj_piggy.p4: DJ Piggy wasn't built to stay quiet. It was built to fire up the engine.
dj_piggy.p5: The lift is on the inside: faster thoughts, easy conversation, loose laughter, and a sense of motion. The plant is more open and less compact, with a more complex aroma profile and a less physical hit than its heavier sisters. It doesn't relax the body—it wakes up the head. And if you overdo it, it can speed up more than you'd like.
dj_piggy.spec_lead: Hybrid with sativa lean. Active, cerebral, great for social or creative moments.
dj_piggy.li5: Airier plant with a more pronounced mental edge
dj_piggy.c3: More complex aroma: citrus, haze, sweet
dj_piggy.s3d: Social lift, ready to make plans.
dj_piggy.s4d: If you overdo it, it can race too hard. Pace yourself.
dj_piggy.crit2: It doesn't get in for being pretty
dj_piggy.crit3: It gets in for a sharp, social, on-the-move head
dj_piggy.made_for: Socializing · Creativity · Music, art · Daytime activities
